column5: *Floaters will need to check the "Absence Alert" Google space regularly, especially the day before and the morning of a regularly scheduled co-op day, to fill in for any absences.
column11: *Floaters will need to check the "Absence Alert" Google space regularly, especially the day before and the morning of a regularly scheduled co-op day, to fill in for any absences.

column5: **Prep Period is one hour of time for members to plan and prepare for co-op classes and events. Prep Period will gather in the Fellowship Hall. Priority is given to those who are leading classes and events. If coverage for absences is needed, those in Prep Period may be asked to step in.
